matches.text: def coeff (b o : Ordinal) : Ordinal →₀ Ordinal :=
matches.snippet:
def coeff (b o : Ordinal) : Ordinal →₀ Ordinal :=
  lookupFinsupp ⟨_, nodupKeys b o⟩

matches.text: def coeff.addMonoidHom (g : Γ) : R⟦Γ⟧ →+ R where
matches.snippet:
def coeff.addMonoidHom (g : Γ) : R⟦Γ⟧ →+ R where
  toFun f := f.coeff g
  map_zero' := coeff_zero
  map_add' _ _ := coeff_add

section Domain

variable [PartialOrder Γ']

matches.text: def constantCoeff : MvPowerSeries σ R →+* R :=
matches.snippet:
/-- The constant coefficient of a formal power series. -/
def constantCoeff : MvPowerSeries σ R →+* R :=
  { coeff (0 : σ →₀ ℕ) with
    toFun := coeff (0 : σ →₀ ℕ)
    map_one' := coeff_zero_one
    map_mul' := fun φ ψ => by classical simp [coeff_mul]
    map_zero' := map_zero _ }

@[simp]

/-- The constant coefficient of a formal power series. -/
def constantCoeff : R⟦X⟧ →+* R :=
  MvPowerSeries.constantCoeff

/-- The constant formal power series. -/

matches.text: noncomputable def constantCoeff : 𝕎 R →+* R where
matches.snippet:
noncomputable def constantCoeff : 𝕎 R →+* R where
  toFun x := x.coeff 0
  map_zero' := by simp
  map_one' := by simp
  map_add' := add_coeff_zero
  map_mul' := mul_coeff_zero

instance [Nontrivial R] : Nontrivial (𝕎 R) :=
  constantCoeff.domain_nontrivial

end WittVector

/-- The range of a morphism of simplicial sets, as a subcomplex. -/
abbrev range : Y.Subcomplex := Subfunctor.range f

/-- The morphism `X ⟶ Subcomplex.range f` induced by `f : X ⟶ Y`. -/

matches.text: def range (f : ι → α) : Set α := {x | ∃ y, f y = x}
matches.snippet:
/-- Range of a function.

This function is more flexible than `f '' univ`, as the image requires that the domain is in Type
and not an arbitrary Sort. -/
def range (f : ι → α) : Set α := {x | ∃ y, f y = x}

@[simp, grind =, push] theorem mem_range {x : α} : x ∈ range f ↔ ∃ y, f y = x := Iff.rfl

@[mfld_simps] theorem mem_range_self (i : ι) : f i ∈ range f := ⟨i, rfl⟩

/-- Any map `f : ι → α` factors through a map `rangeFactorization f : ι → range f`. -/

matches.text: lemma range'_0 (a b : ℕ) : range' a b 0 = replicate b a := by
matches.snippet:
lemma range'_0 (a b : ℕ) : range' a b 0 = replicate b a := by
  induction b with
  | zero => simp
  | succ b ih => simp [range'_succ, ih, replicate_succ]
